LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND AND CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 19, 2014, TO GIVE THE OPPOSING PARTY A CHANCE TO COMPLY WITH SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B. THE OPPOSING PARTY SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY OF MR. VLADISLAVICH'S OPPOSITION/RESPONSE WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Feb-19-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: CONCHITA LOZANO-BATISTA, ESQ., 410.337.1001, FOR PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' CONFERENCE BOARD.
JAMES DAWSON, ESQ., 408.288.8100, FOR NON-PARTY MARKO VLADISLAVICH.

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT TOOK PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, IN THEIR CAPACITIES AS TRUSTEES OF THE CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND FOR CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND FOR NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' CONFERENCE BOARD's Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award UNDER SUBMISSION. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar Jan-29-2014 Continued To Feb-19-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONERS THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS PENSION TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS TRAINING TRUST FUND and CARPENTERS 46 NORTHERN CALIFORNIA COUNTIES' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is continued to February 19, 2014, to give the opposing party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of Mr. Vladislavich's opposition/response with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)
